name: TDG Gold Corp.
description: TDG Gold Corp. is a junior gold-copper-silver explorer focused on the Greater Shasta-Newberry project in the Toodoggone District of British Columbia, holding approximately 50,000 hectares in two former producing mining districts. The company's flagship project is contiguous with Freeport-Amarc's AuRORA1 gold-rich copper porphyry discovery, and TDG also holds the Anyox copper district with over 10,000 hectares of crown grants.
